POWER_Peripheral

fields.name: POFCON
fields.description:
General purpose retention register. This register is a retained
register.

fields.name: RAMON
fields.description:
Pin reset functionality configuration register. This register is a
retained register.

record_types.name: RAMON_Register

fields.name: ONRAM0
fields.description: RAM block 1 behaviour in ON mode.

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: RAM block 0 behaviour in OFF mode.

fields.name: OFFRAM0
fields.description: RAM block 1 behaviour in OFF mode.

record_types.name: RAMONB_Register

fields.name: ONRAM2
fields.description: RAM block 3 behaviour in ON mode.

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: RAM block 2 behaviour in OFF mode.

fields.name: OFFRAM2
fields.description: RAM block 3 behaviour in OFF mode.

record_types.name: RAMSTATUS_Register
RESET_Register
RESETREAS_Register

fields.name: Reserved_4_15
fields.description:
Reset from wake-up from OFF mode detected by the use of DETECT signal
from GPIO.

fields.name: OFF
fields.description:
Reset from wake-up from OFF mode detected by the use of ANADETECT
signal from LPCOMP.

fields.name: LPCOMP
fields.description:
Reset from wake-up from OFF mode detected by entering into debug
interface mode.

record_types.name: SYSTEMOFF_Register

variables.name: POWER_Periph
variables.code:
POWER_Periph : aliased POWER_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => POWER_Base;
